# Method catalog (complete inventory)

This catalog lists **all 82 registered methods** in the live plugin registry. It is generated from `histoweave.plugins.list_methods()` so it cannot silently lag the code.

## Coverage snapshot

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total methods | 82 |
| Release (production ∪ beta ∪ validated) | 53 |
| Research incubator | 23 |
| Baseline / teaching | 6 |
| Unclassified | 0 |
| SOTA track plugins | 5 |

All registered methods are classified into a release-manifest track (production / beta / validated / research / baseline).
